summary: Footage of ICE Acting Director Todd Lyons speaking at the VOICE office podium event, explaining that the office helps all victims of immigration-related crime regardless of offense, with victims' families standing behind him. It is a captioned speech clip with no music track. On-screen text reads 'TODD LYONS ICE ACTING DIRECTOR', 'VICTIMS OF IMMIGRATION CRIME ENGAGEMENT 1-855-48-VOICE', and 'TOLL-FREE VOICE HOTLINE: 855-48-VOICE (855-488-6423)'.
notable_text: TODD LYONS ICE ACTING DIRECTOR; VICTIMS OF IMMIGRATION CRIME ENGAGEMENT 1-855-48-VOICE; TOLL-FREE VOICE HOTLINE: 855-48-VOICE (855-488-6423)
